prompt: Route this task: 'Design and implement a real-time notification system: push notifications on mobile (Flutter) and a WebSocket server on the backend (FastAPI), plus update the shared API contract.'

assertions.name: suggests_mobile_developer
assertions.description: Should suggest mobile-developer for Flutter push notification work

assertions.name: suggests_backend_architect
assertions.description: Should suggest backend-architect for WebSocket/FastAPI work

assertions.name: identifies_parallel_work
assertions.description: Should identify that work can proceed in parallel

assertions.name: provides_task_split
assertions.description: Should provide a task breakdown per agent
